Package org.eventb.internal.core.ast

Class FormulaTranslatabilityChecker

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.DefaultInspector<String>
org.eventb.internal.core.ast.FormulaTranslatabilityChecker
All Implemented Interfaces:
IFormulaInspector<String>
public class FormulaTranslatabilityChecker extends DefaultInspector<String>
Checks that a formula can be translated to some target factory. Free identifiers are first checked using the cache implemented in the formula. Then, we run an inspector on the formula to check types and extensions. Types need only be verified on leaf nodes that can introduce new types.

  • Method Details

    • isTranslatable

      public static boolean isTranslatable(Formula<?> formula, FormulaFactory factory, FreeIdentifier[] idents)
      Tells whether the given formula can be translated to the given factory. The third parameter is a direct access to the cache of free identifiers of the formula to avoid making a copy of this array.
      Parameters:
      formula - some formula
      factory - the target formula factory
      idents - a direct access to the cache of free identifiers of the given formula
      Returns:
      true if the given formula can be translated to the given factory
